blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,914 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
